taskVersion.name: find_reversed_word_single

parts.text:
Below is a jumbled sequence of 50 random alphanumeric strings. Within this data, there is one English word spelled backwards.

Data Block: [2IT9n5Jf, 59Pwzrw, NhGVEX, wzot4Qv, Rk7fjIwy, nNpWBTN, u8p02HUc, 2nn2J, QVRJGT, Xo39HvQ, A8n6B4, SovVec, pyfWnYk, BAKqf7Q0, CpP3It5, Zt2ZKu, ZS9Pb, g8DsJBxb, ELGGAK, EmRbVEP, tYIrj, Hb6DES, pKsnXl, f0ZR7, yTggOW, WvnN8h9, sokCrNk, UnIQbXo9, FqVLQ, YQ4k3, 4K3upjc, Jcl83, nGdGz8t, jAlefuq, NZDwdFc, 3JmWZ9D, ZvO6wBD, 4uzDn, ByiD5R, 1V5YlJm, iWBt3ojD, J2YX5, mKsJGr, 7SQnP5, DLW8o, ZjAXodi, hfJFo, 2HHAgGgn, 2odyf33, rghM1]

Task: Find the English word hidden in the sequence, reverse it to its original spelling, and output only that word.
R n u n Q X
